summary: UC-ATM-11 is satisfied in the current worktree scope: the shared LSMap contract doc exists with the required types and access-token convention, the sandbox fixture file contains the 3 required scenarios including a 3-polyline alternate-route case, and the scoped iOS LSMap stub compiles without importing MapboxMaps while using LSGlassPanel as the fallback body.

reviewer_considerations: The scoped task files are confined to the allowed write scope: tokens/api/LSMap.contract.md, tokens/sandbox/fixtures/routes.fixtures.json, and ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSMap.swift.
LSMap.swift intentionally keeps all contract type declarations local to the stub so UC-ATM-12-ios can replace only the rendering body without changing the shared signature.
No Android production files were touched, and no .kb-run files were modified.
